title: Baked Beans
instructions: Cook bacon in a large Dutch oven.
Remove bacon when crisp and drain, then break into pieces.
Stir onion, pepper, and garlic into bacon fat.
Cook, stirring often, until vegetables are softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in paprika, chili powder, salt and pepper.
Stir in the vinegar, BBQ sauce, ketchup, mustard and brown sugar until combined.
Stir in the baked beans and bring to a boil.
Transfer Dutch oven to preheated oven and bake for 30 minutes.
notes: Often served with Honeybaked Ham and Carol's corn custard recipe for parties.
